overall.description: First-person walking sequence in Cyberpunk 2077 along a foggy highway at night, passing under an overpass with graffiti-covered concrete walls, ending at a waterfront railing overlooking a distant neon-lit cityscape with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway sidewalk with graffiti-covered retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway sidewalk next to a concrete wall covered in graffiti, approaching an overpass

notable_agents.action: cars passing by on the highway with headlights illuminating the fog

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
elevated highway structure with street lights spanning across the road
tall street lamp casting yellow-white light through the fog

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy highway at night beside a graffiti-covered concrete wall. Vehicles pass by on the left while the camera approaches an overpass structure ahead. Street lights pierce through the haze, creating a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the highway overpass, lighting becomes darker

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass where the environment becomes darker and more enclosed

segments.scene_description: Moving under the highway overpass, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed. The concrete wall with graffiti continues on the right while traffic passes underneath the bridge structure. The lighting shifts to a dimmer, sheltered ambiance.

events.description: exiting the underpass into open area, concrete retaining wall ends
turning right toward the metal railing overlooking the water and city

agents.ego_description: walking past the end of the concrete wall and turning toward the waterfront railing to view the cityscape

entered.detail: white metal safety railing along the waterfront edge
massive futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass into an open area where the concrete wall ends. The camera turns toward a metal railing revealing a view of the distant city. A massive megabuilding with lights becomes visible through the fog across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with city skyline view

events.description: arriving at railing with full view of distant cityscape and holographic billboard

agents.ego_description: standing at the railing looking out at the foggy cityscape with neon lights and a large holographic advertisement

entered.detail: large glowing holographic advertisement floating above the distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Standing at the waterfront railing overlooking a vast foggy cityscape. A massive holographic billboard glows above the distant megabuildings, casting neon light through the haze. The highway and overpass are now behind as the camera focuses on the panoramic urban view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, foggy highway corridor toward a vast, neon-lit urban panorama. It begins by walking along a concrete wall covered in graffiti, where street lights pierce through a dense nighttime haze as vehicles pass by on the left. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed while passing beneath the heavy structure of a highway overpass. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the underpass and turns toward a metal railing, causing the oppressive concrete walls to give way to an expansive waterfront view. Finally, the perspective settles on a distant, foggy cityscape where a massive holographic billboard casts a neon glow over towering megabuildings across the water.
